reviews.review_title: An Arcade Cabinet without the 4th Wall
reviews.review_description: Great game. Easy to play. The graphics feel as if you entered a Tron arcade cabinet game from the 80s. You lost hundreds of quarters to it, oh so long ago. Only now you have broken through the game screen—a childhood dream. Yet in VR the game feels both nostalgic and new, retro and right now. It will delight all, not just Gen X. Wish I would have bought it sooner.

reviews.review_title: An Ode to Classic Arcade and Tron!
reviews.review_description:
For a while now I was wondering when I would be able to play a shooter on the quest that was more reminiscent of the old classic arcades. I will be honest this was a good mix of modern technology and good old classic fun. Together you have a love child of retro and modern styles perfectly balanced and blended to one nice package!

The game is straightforward and to the point, grab your gun and start shooting anything that is labeled in red. Anything else is either a power up, a secret or something that you can use to your advantage to defeat enemies. The enemies are numerous and can easily swarm you if you're not careful, you need to think fast and make sure to keep your health as high as possible, you're going to need it.

One thing I appreciate most is the level of detail with the bosses. Each one offers a good enough challenge as well as enough immersion to make this feel like a great bombastic battle against titans as opposed to just another enemy. I also love how they are reminiscent of Tron's Master Control Program, where they are large and have that low polygon look, yet carry great power and can overwhelm you with sheer power.

I also appreciate the intricate details surrounding the Hub menu, where your character lives supposedly in a basement, filled with newspaper pieces detailing what is going on in this world. It gives me a bit of a Matrix feel. Plus you can also recognize which trophies you have and which you lack. 

Definitely am having a blast with this, I highly appreciate the level of work you guys put into this and hope to see more in the future from you guys. I absolutely love this, both as a fan of sci Fi movies from the '80s as well as a gamer of the modern era. That and it reminds me of the episode Power Mad from the Fairly Odd Parents back in the day. Always wanted games like thisa and now I have it! Much appreciated for your talent and care with this game!

This is the best thing I’ve ever played. This game is definitely worth five dollars. I’d even buy it for $10. It is very fun. It is easy to figure out. I don’t know if you can play multiplayer. This is definitely the best game I’ve ever played because it is, mind blowing, fun, fast paced, many different modes, great quality, and a lot of work has been put into this. I can tell. This game is unique among others. If I were you I would wait to buy this until a holiday sale. I bought this during a holiday so when it was 50% off.
Fun game, got it mainly for protube haptic support but currently broken implementation.  Hopefully there is a fix.

While not exactly Tron in real life ...hold on it is Tron in real life...

I am living the dream I had as a teenager in the 1980s.  No not that one, the other one about that day in the far distant future when computer graphics will be 3d realtime and I am virtually in the game!

I purchased the game, because it was on a list of those supporting the provolver.  Sad to say the integration is not very good.  A game such as Space Pirate Trainer shows how it can be done for lasers etc.  While ARK ADE just gives a constant buzz across the "kick".

reviews.review_title: Only good if it's your first vr game
reviews.review_description: Vr games have way surpassed what this is trying to do.

This game wears thin very quickly. The game play is very shallow and simple and just plain boring!
There are no permanent weapons upgrades. Only power ups that last literally a second or two and so you play 90% of the game with an anemic feeling 'pew pew' gun that is like a bad joke.
So there is zero tactics or strategy and all the replay value of tic tac toe.
The graphics style is simple which is fine but the saturated red on blue is literally retina searing and never changes. I never had my eyes water so much in a game before.
The devs really need to get a clue and change up the colors from level to level to give peoples eyes a break. 
The enemies are varied yet feel exactly the same somehow and there is zero AI. They all just spawn, stand there and shoot. Again, really shallow feeling gameplay. 
The turrets are bullet sponges that really slow down the game and the bosses are these dumbed down, drawn out affairs that feel like a chore rather than a game. 
I can't believe the good reviews because this is one simply, boring game. Apparently that appeals to a lot of people but I like games that are actually fun.

developer_response.body: Hey there BobbyGophast! Our game was purposefully designed to be an homage to retro arcade experiences and we're so sorry Ark and Ade isn't for you, but that's OK. Thank you for taking the time with the game nevertheless!

reviews.review_description:
Amazing game 
Incredible price it s by far better than runner by 100 times .

I only imagine if it had come out  in the 1980 s 
I can’t believe I m living my dreams in VR 
I wished this was around ever since I was a kid 

I had always dream being inside of a STAR WARS Star Destroyer or to face DARTH VADER and done so and been inside a story book like MOSS 
…….I can’t wait For BLADE RUNNER in VR  

Thanks to VR technology

developer_response.body: This put a smile on our faces. Thank you, VrSkin1969! The combination of 80's nostalgia and modern technology is exactly what we were aiming for with ARK and ADE, and we're glad this is how most players seem to experience it. We live in interesting times indeed. :)

reviews.review_title: This is what vr is made for.
reviews.review_description: No immersion breaking loading screens, you get pulled right into the screen. The first level was fun and it’s boss fight was uniquely exhilarating, not know what to do at first before it suddenly clicks.

developer_response.body: Hi SpongeKing!!! Glad you liked the game! Next bosses are even more exhilarating the first one was actually suppoed to be the scary guy!!!

reviews.review_description:
Anyone who has lived through the 'arcade era' will be amazed by this game. You can feel the passion the develops have for old school coin-op arcade machines. The graphics, the SFX, the BGM. It's all there.
The game is still in development, but it feels solid already. 

The replayability will largely depends on unlockables, upgrades etc. I don't think it needs more stages/levels at this point. A start has been made with achievables, but I don't think they unlock anything (yet). 

I think one of the developers mentioned in an interview that they want to sell at least 10k copies before they think of multiplayer, but there's hardly any promotion for this title so it's hard for me to see how they plan to reach that number. Such a shame. Boot up your marketing machine guys! People need to know about this gem.
I paid $5 but I think it’s worth $10. Few games around here actually “deserve” their $30 price tags. Controversial opinion I suppose.

Worth it, very fun, and insanely hard on the higher difficulties, exactly what I was looking for, keeping my name near the top of the leaderboards keeps me coming back. Keep the updates coming, love how the dev takes into consideration nearly everything the community suggests. Definitely deserves it's place on the actual oculus store, hope to see it there soon.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Rez, High scoring and challanging our friends are the reasons we used to play in arcades back in the days! I'm glad we managed to bring that feeling back in VR.

As for our community there's just a lot of great people that give us feedbacks on the game. They made ARK-ADE better and better at every update, would be stupid not to listen!

Thanks a lot for playng our game!

reviews.review_description: Such an AWESOME game like being inside TRON for real, played the demo once and had to buy it it's the second game I have purchased on my new headset right after Vader so that says a lot. Keep the updates coming on this future classic!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot!!! These reviews are the one that keep us going!!! ARK-ADE being your second purchase feels great... More levels and bossfights are coming soon!

reviews.review_description: This is a great feel good game. It has potential for casuals and perfectionists alike. This is a perfect shooter for anyone who needs to get their VR legs so to speak. Fun environments that don't aggravate any fear of heights and you can fine tune the motion to get used to playing without getting motion sickness. This game is beautiful

What an absolute blast this is I haven't felt this nostalgic from a game in years, I've played a fair amount of games on the quest 2 but this has one of the biggest things a game should have and that's fun!! The gameplay is solid I enjoy the reloading and the pick ups for a new weapon the bullet time ability is pretty cool and ADE is a pain in the backside but it's just so fun to play, this is a game that I would highly recommend to anyone and I hope it gets an official oculus store release because it deserves more recognition.

The only thing I would like is the ability to sprint and upgrades for the gun and abilities, can't wait to see what future updates brings, and one more thing this actually has oculus scoreboard achievements and hopefully more to be added in future content/updates and it's not even on the official store (I love achievements haha) something other devs could take note of!

developer_response.body:
Hi BLOODSHOTsk sprint is something we're already talking about, it will make the game even faster maybe too much, we might add it as an option. We're now working on new custom bosses for each level. ADE will stay in a couple of them but it felt too repetitive as it is now.

We're glad you are enjoying our game, trust me we're doing our best, this is our first experience as gamedevs, there are no expert here! Feedbacks like yours make the game better and better and keep us going, thanks a lot!

reviews.review_description: The tight controls, the bright neon colours, the soundtrack, the retro feeling here fuses amazingly well with VR. Im a child of the 80s so theres a lot to appreciate here but that's just a bonus for me - this game is gold. Usually I get motion sickness moving and turning in a game like this but not this one. Looking forward to the 2 gun update for sure.
Amazing atmosphere, very good mechanics.
A fun and easy to pick up shooter, with a brilliant artistic style. Can’t wait to play more of it!

developer_response.body: You're Brilliant! Thanks for your feedback Josh.

reviews.review_description: Just what I said
SUPER FUN! Just tested it out. The visuals, gun play, and bullet time etc etc. I picked it up on sale and am glad I did.
